mcqs.question: What is the primary purpose of real estate licensing?

choices.A: To ensure public representation by competent individuals

mcqs.source_page: Chapter 1 - Real Estate Law and Real Estate Business

mcqs.question: Which of the following is NOT a requirement for a real estate salesperson license in Arizona?

choices.D: Being a U.S. citizen or resident alien

mcqs.source_page: Chapter 1 - Real Estate Law and Real Estate Business

mcqs.question: What is the role of a designated broker in a real estate brokerage?

choices.A: To manage the brokerage's marketing strategies
choices.B: To act on behalf of the employing real estate entity
choices.C: To provide legal advice to clients

mcqs.source_page: Chapter 1 - Real Estate Law and Real Estate Business

mcqs.question: Which of the following is considered a violation of the Sherman Anti-Trust Act?

choices.A: Setting commissions for all real estate brokerages

mcqs.source_page: Chapter 1 - Real Estate Law and Real Estate Business

mcqs.question: What is the purpose of the Tax Equity and Fiscal Responsibility Act (TEFRA) of 1982 in relation to real estate agents?

choices.A: To classify real estate agents as independent contractors
choices.B: To increase taxes on real estate transactions
choices.C: To provide health insurance to real estate agents

mcqs.source_page: Chapter 1 - Real Estate Law and Real Estate Business
